_comment_vault_root: The vault root is read from .claude/knowledge-base.local.md. Set 'vault_root' here only to override it.
_comment_quill: For the Quill adapter, set source_name to 'quill' and (optionally) source_db_path.
_comment_llm: LLM formatting is optional. When llm_enabled is true, provide ANTHROPIC_API_KEY (or AZURE_ANTHROPIC_ENDPOINT + AZURE_ANTHROPIC_API_KEY, or ANTHROPIC_GATEWAY_URL + ANTHROPIC_GATEWAY_KEY) in the environment — or point env_file at a file that exports it. llm_verbatim adds a second call that formats the FULL verbatim transcript.
_comment_crm: CRM is optional and column-driven: only columns that exist in your CSV headers are ever written. Registries map LLM enrichment categories to CSV files; paths are vault-root-relative. The CSVs must already exist with a header row.
_comment_tasks: When tasks.enabled is true, extracted action items are appended to your task inbox. inbox defaults to task_inbox from .claude/knowledge-base.local.md; set it here (vault-relative) to override.
_comment_schedule: install-schedule registers a recurring sync every schedule_sync_hours (launchd / Task Scheduler / cron) and, when schedule_verify is true, a weekly verify. Secrets are never written into job definitions — use env_file.
